title: Important Information for CLICO Policyholders
text: The Judicial Manager for CLICO International Life Insurance Company (“CLICO”), Deloitte Consulting Inc., has launched a dedicated website, to provide official updates on the Judicial Management process. The Judicial Manager remains responsible for claim-related matters and the ongoing realization process across Antigua and Barbuda, Dominica, Grenada, and St. Vincent and the Grenadines. For the most accurate and current information regarding your policy, including claims, payments, and other services, please visit the official CLICO website : https://clicolife.com/
